explanations.pt-br: Funcao smart_reasoning: classifica antes de decidir usar reasoning.
explanations.en-us: smart_reasoning function: classifies before deciding to use reasoning.

explanations.pt-br: Se simples: usa GPT-4o sem reasoning.
explanations.en-us: If simple: use GPT-4o without reasoning.

explanations.pt-br: Se complexa: usa o3-mini com reasoning_effort high.
explanations.en-us: If complex: use o3-mini with reasoning_effort high.

explanations.pt-br: Teste com pergunta simples e complexa.
explanations.en-us: Test with simple and complex question.
